notes: Short prose loop: trust is justified by reliability, and reliability is justified by trusted adoption before the conclusion restates the original trust claim.

steps.summary: Initial trust claim justified by reliability.
Reliability is justified by trusted adoption.
Conclusion restates the trust claim using the same reliability premise.

bonds.note: Initial trust claim leads into reliability support.
Conclusion restates the original trust claim.
Conclusion closes the loop back onto the opening premise.

findings.description: Circular support chain around trust and reliability.
